user_message: [AUTOMATION TRIGGER] Scheduled Calendar event with non-Microsoft external attendee detected initiated for Lucerne Publishing.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Laura Anderson <laura.anderson@lucernepubli.com>
To: Tom Rodriguez <tom.rodriguez@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-01 10:27 EST
Subject: Re: Re: deployment blockers Timeline

Thank you for the discussion last week. We'd like to move forward with deployment blockers. Can we schedule a call this week to finalize the timeline?

---
From: Tom Rodriguez <tom.rodriguez@microsoft.com>
To: Laura Anderson <laura.anderson@lucernepubli.com>
Date: 2024-02-28 13:20 EST
Subject: Re: Re: deployment blockers Timeline

Just checking in on the deployment blockers proposal. Our Head of Digital is asking for a status update before the board meeting next week.

---
From: Laura Anderson <laura.anderson@lucernepubli.com>
To: Tom Rodriguez <tom.rodriguez@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-01-17 15:48 EST
Subject: Re: Re: deployment blockers Timeline

There's been a change in our timeline for deployment blockers. Can we discuss the implications on the overall project plan?

Meeting: deployment blockers Discussion - Lucerne Publishing
Date: 2024-03-23
Duration: 45 minutes
Attendees: Laura Anderson (Lucerne Publishing), Tom Rodriguez (Microsoft)

[00:02:00] Laura Anderson (Lucerne Publishing): Good morning. I wanted to follow up on deployment blockers from our last session.

[00:07:00] Laura Anderson (Lucerne Publishing): Our director reviewed this and has concerns about partner engagement. Can we address those?

[00:09:00] Laura Anderson (Lucerne Publishing): The timeline for stakeholder alignment is aggressive. We need to validate the assumptions.

[00:11:00] Tom Rodriguez (Microsoft): On the deployment blockers front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around data residency.

[00:13:00] Tom Rodriguez (Microsoft): The timeline for budget approval is aggressive. We need to validate the assumptions.

[00:16:00] Tom Rodriguez (Microsoft): The timeline for data residency is aggressive. We need to validate the assumptions.

[00:20:00] Laura Anderson (Lucerne Publishing): Let me add some context -- we've been working on security compliance and found that the cost projections need to factor in reserved instance pricing for accuracy.

[00:23:00] Laura Anderson (Lucerne Publishing): Our director reviewed this and has concerns about budget approval. Can we address those?

[00:26:00] Tom Rodriguez (Microsoft): The timeline for stakeholder alignment is aggressive. We need to validate the assumptions.

[00:29:00] Laura Anderson (Lucerne Publishing): Our team lead reviewed this and has concerns about performance requirements. Can we address those?

[00:33:00] Tom Rodriguez (Microsoft): Our team lead reviewed this and has concerns about resource allocation. Can we address those?
